markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if any leader in the set leaves office.
markets.rules_primary: If the individual holding the title of Prime Minister of Canada at the time of Issuance is the first within G7 leaders to leave their position, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The individual must actually leave office and no longer hold their title. An announcement of resignation or intention to leave is not sufficient. The person who held the position at market issuance must be the one who leaves (not a successor). If a leader dies in office, all markets in the set settle at their last traded prices before the death, with the Exchange determining fair allocation if prices are not logically consistent. Leaders can leave office through resignation, removal, term limits, electoral defeat, coup, impeachment and removal, or other constitutional processes. The first leader to leave triggers resolution for all markets in the set - the one who left resolves to Yes, all others resolve to No.
markets.subtitle: :: Prime Minister of Canada
markets.title: Will Prime Minister of Canada be the first to leave office?

markets.rules_primary: If the individual holding the title of Prime Minister of Japan at the time of Issuance is the first within G7 leaders to leave their position, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The individual must actually leave office and no longer hold their title. An announcement of resignation or intention to leave is not sufficient. The person who held the position at market issuance must be the one who leaves (not a successor). If a leader dies in office, all markets in the set settle at their last traded prices before the death, with the Exchange determining fair allocation if prices are not logically consistent. Leaders can leave office through resignation, removal, term limits, electoral defeat, coup, impeachment and removal, or other constitutional processes. The first leader to leave triggers resolution for all markets in the set - the one who left resolves to Yes, all others resolve to No.
markets.subtitle: :: Prime Minister of Japan
markets.title: Will Prime Minister of Japan be the first to leave office?

markets.rules_primary: If Anya Taylor-Joy performs/ is announced as Britney Spears in the Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu, then the market resolves to Yes.

For the purposes of this Contract, Anya Taylor-Joy satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Anya Taylor-Joy is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform Britney Spears in Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:
Anya Taylor-Joy appears on stage, on screen, or in recorded content as Britney Spears in any official performance, showing, or release of Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu.

Additional clarification(s):

If Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu is entirely cancelled or abandoned before any official performance or release occurs, but Anya Taylor-Joy was officially announced in Britney Spears, the Contract will resolve to “Yes.”

The Contract may resolve to “No” prior to the Expiration Date if:
(a) Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu is cancelled or completes its run without Anya Taylor-Joy being announced or performing in Britney Spears, or
(b) another person is officially announced as the sole exclusive performer for Britney Spears.
markets.title: Will Anya Taylor-Joy perform as Britney Spears in Britney Spears Biopic directed by Jon M. Chu?
